title: IGN投票選出最佳蜘蛛俠 Tom Holland壓倒性勝出

replies.msg:
https://m.ign.com/articles/2019/06/28/half-of-ign-readers-think-tom-holland-is-the-best-spider-man



Nearly half of our readers felt the current Spider-Man, Tom Holland, is the best with 47.1% of the vote.

Coming in second with 27.4% of the vote is the first true live-action Spider-Man, Tobey Maguire, who starred in Sam Raimi's Spider-Man and Spider-Man 2.

After these two heavy hitters, Christopher Daniel Barnes comes in at at 11.3% of the vote. Barnes provided the voice of Spider-Man in the animated series that ran from 1994-1998.

PS4 game Marvel's Spider-Man, came in at fourth with 7.8% of the votes.

Naturally, somebody has to come in last, and in this case it's Andrew Garfield, who portrayed the web-slinger in The Amazing Spider-Man and The Amazing Spider-Man 2. While both of those films are largely considered among the worst of the Spider-Man movies, Garfield does have his share of fans. 6.5%, to be specific.

Tom Holland票數達47.1% 接近一半
